special_notes: NHDPlus HR NR2 FileGDB downloaded from ScienceBase/TNM. 60 GB unzipped. 15 layers total (12 spatial, 3 attribute tables). CRS is NAD83 + NAVD88 (compound). User guide: https://pubs.usgs.gov/publication/ofr20191096

layers.notes: Attributes only — no geometry for Athena reporting joins. ~25M features, ~80 columns. Geometry can be joined back via permanent_identifier or nhdplusid if needed.
Non-spatial flow routing/topology table. FromNHDPlusID → ToNHDPlusID. ~34.5M rows, 11 columns. No unique row ID — each row is a directed edge.
HUC12 watershed boundaries with simplified geometry for mapping and spatial queries. ~90K features.
